margin_product.reason: EXMO Margin requires live API stability, eligibility, leverage/collateral/risk policy, position/balance parsers, and product-scoped lifecycle.

contract_product.reason: No stable live standard futures, perpetual, or options runtime is verified for the current adapter profile.

perpetual_product.reason: Perpetual-futures materials are treated as active-development/not a stable live API until re-audited.

futures_product.reason: No stable live standard futures API is wired for this spot adapter.

official_sources.evidence: EXMO spot API material is the current runtime scope for this adapter.
EXMO margin/perpetual material is treated as a separate product boundary and is not wired as stable live standard-contract runtime.

runtime_isolation: Do not route EXMO Margin or active-development derivatives material through spot runtime until live API stability, account eligibility, product metadata, positions, risk, private order lifecycle, and reconciliation are audited.
required_audit_gaps: live margin/derivatives API stability and product scope
account eligibility, leverage, collateral, and risk mode
positions and margin balance parser fixtures
